context.description: the code to assess, filled into the prompt body

question.description: the specific best-practices question, filled into the 'Question:' line

additionalInstructions.description: declared for the union of double-brace tokens present in the shared payload file; not filled by the best-practices builder

conversationHistory.description: declared for the union of double-brace tokens present in the shared payload file; not filled by the best-practices builder

sample.question: Is the error handling here robust?

checks: analysis covers quality/best-practice adherence, improvements/concerns, coverage, dependency management, and docs

provider.notes: filled by PromptTemplateBuilder.buildBestPracticesPrompt() ({{context}} + {{question}}); union of prompt-templates.ts double-brace tokens declared (extra = WARN only)
